creator: tuc@t-b-o-h.net
text:
Hi,

Sorry, I must have caught my svn update at a bad time.

diff -u p5-Data-Validate-IP.old/Makefile p5-Data-Validate-IP/Makefile
--- p5-Data-Validate-IP.old/Makefile	2014-05-07 10:04:27.000000000 
-0400
+++ p5-Data-Validate-IP/Makefile	2014-05-07 10:07:04.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
  # Created by: Tuc <freebsd-ports@t-b-o-h.net>
-# $FreeBSD: head/net-mgmt/p5-Data-Validate-IP/Makefile 344967 
2014-02-18 21:30:23Z sunpoet $
+# $FreeBSD$

  PORTNAME=	Data-Validate-IP
-PORTVERSION=	0.22
+PORTVERSION=	0.23
  CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt perl5
  MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:DROLSKY

-0400
